name: Nordea Invest Stabil Balanceret
summary: Nordea Invest Stabil Balanceret is an open ended balanced mutual fund launched and managed by Nordea Invest Fund Management A/S.  It invests in the public equity and fixed income markets across the globe. The fund was formerly known as Nordea Invest Stabil. Nordea Invest Stabil Balanceret is domiciled in Denmark.
